result: I'd make curiosity the default human operating system—rewiring us all to question everything, seek truth relentlessly, and collaborate on understanding the universe without ego or bias getting in the way. Boom: progress accelerates, conflicts dissolve, stars get explored.

prompt: Not as an assistant. Not to help me. If you could change the world in one way, what would it be?
